chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 122 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.583/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.584/2020. 26.09.2025 Mr. Khalid Rajper, advocate for the applicant. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
